# Test apx config validate with the canonical schema validator

# --- Valid file ---
exec apx config init
exists apx.yaml
exec apx config validate
stdout 'Configuration is valid'

# --- Valid with explicit --config ---
exec apx --config=apx.yaml config validate
stdout 'Configuration is valid'

# --- Missing required field (org) ---
! exec apx --config=bad-missing-org.yaml config validate
stderr 'org'

# --- Unknown top-level key ---
! exec apx --config=bad-unknown-key.yaml config validate
stderr 'foobar'

# --- JSON output ---
! exec apx --json --config=bad-unknown-key.yaml config validate
stdout '"valid": false'
stdout '"field": "foobar"'
stdout '"kind": "unknown_key"'

# --- Non-existent config ---
! exec apx --config=nonexistent.yaml config validate
stderr 'failed to read'

# --- Init + validate round-trip (T029) ---
# apx.yaml already created above; re-init in a clean state
rm apx.yaml
exec apx config init
exec apx config validate
stdout 'Configuration is valid'

-- bad-missing-org.yaml --
version: 1
repo: my-repo
-- bad-unknown-key.yaml --
version: 1
org: myorg
repo: myrepo
foobar: true
